creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
(In reply to Lars Henrik Ørn from comment #4)
Isn't it up there already? Until committed you can just apply the patch to /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/frescobaldi_app/portmidi/__init__.py from the installed package. (The actual path might differ if you've changed the default python version, but this should be quite evident.)
